57.reason: ['now' may be uninitialized if both polynomials are empty or have zero terms, causing undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  ['now' may be uninitialized if both input polynomials are empty or have zero terms, leading to segmentation fault. Also, 'new' was reallocated without initializing its 'to' field, so the chain from 'new' may be broken.]

68.reason: [If 'next' is the last real node before 'final', 'next->to' is 'final', and modifying 'final->from' here may corrupt sentinel logic. Also, this merging during selection sort is unsafe and skips nodes.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [If 'next' is the last real node before 'final', 'next->to' is 'final', and modifying 'final->from' here may corrupt sentinel logic. Also, this merging during selection sort is unsafe and skips nodes.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  [If next->to is NULL or points to an invalid node (e.g., final not properly linked), this causes undefined behavior. Also, modifying links during traversal can break the list structure.]
